combined_text: Legendary singer Frank Sinatra dies "Legendary singer Frank Sinatra dies May 15, 1998 Web posted at: 10:57 a.m. EDT (1457 GMT)LOS ANGELES (CNN) -- ""Ol' Blue Eyes,"" Frank Sinatra, is being mourned Friday around the world by millions of fans after his death from a heart attack.
